title: Remove stale projection and event dead code
goal: Remove obsolete compact-feed helper code and event decoding helpers that only existed for retired status blocks, while preserving the canonical compact feed sections and semantics.
acceptance: Remove or otherwise resolve current dead-code warnings from stale projection/feed helpers without restoring old dashboard block labels.
The compact feed still exposes Run, Workers, Attention, optional Commands, Checks, and Economics, and does not resurrect Todos, Activity, Tail, Terminal, Replan, or Shell blocks.
cargo check --quiet completes without dead-code warnings from src/workflow/projection.rs or src/workflow/events.rs.
